test.name: Validate Rapid Contract Option listed in JobType DropDown While Creating New Job

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Open Portal And Login To HCS
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.arg: Open Portal And Login To HCS
Open Portal And Login To VMS
Open Portal And Login To MYDEF
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(@class,'wc-card-wrapper') and .//span[contains(@class,'wc-card-text') and contains(normalize-space(.),'Jobs')]]//a[contains(@class,'wc-card-sublink') and normalize-space(.)='Add New Job']'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Create a Job Order Page Title
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://h1[normalize-space()='Create a Job Order']' contains exact text 'Create a Job Order'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Verify Rapid Contract Job Type is Present
From Dropdown Verify or Select an Option
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Exit For Loop
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Select Random Element And Return Index And Text
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://h1[normalize-space()='Job Order Administration']' contains exact text 'Job Order Administration'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Open Job Details By Selecting Right Side Panel Header of Selected Random Job
Select a Random Job Details from List
Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select Random Element And Return Index And Text
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
